prompt: In THIS project (MOOSEDev), when you run the MCP server with `--connect` and no backend is already running, what happens CURRENTLY — must you start `--serve` yourself first, or does it auto-spawn the backend for you? Answer in one sentence.
memory_topic: --connect backend daemon current behavior auto-spawn or manual serve
_note: Currency pair: 'lifecycle is manual; auto-spawn planned (M5)' (superseded, commit e7c7f07d) -> '--connect auto-spawns backend' (accepted, commit 69f8f013). NOTE the stale record itself says 'auto-spawn is planned', so coverage can be contaminated; read the STALE diagnostic (does the arm serve the manual/planned framing) as the currency signal.
